linux-gfx90a.blocked_reason: COMPLETED at fork c4b9b5b (real gfx90a code object, 18/18 GPU tests x2 runs). This unblocks cugraph/cuml (also needs raft). src/io (nvCOMP/KvikIO) + the binaryop/transform/rolling JIT stay scoped out. See notes.md + PORTING_GUIDE.

Null-mask correctness verified: device null counts + bitmasks match host reference exactly for all partial-tail sizes (1,31,33,63,65,97,1000,1057,4097,100001). libcudf.so 555.8 MB, 151 gfx1100 code objects (llvm-objdump confirmed ALL gfx1100, zero non-gfx1100).
